name: Cranberry-Cream Cheese Frosties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the cranberry sauce with a fork.
2. Add the lemon juice and mix well.
3. Pour into small paper cups or a 1-quart refrigerator tray.
4. Combine the softened cream cheese, mayonnaise, powdered sugar, and chopped nuts in a bowl.
5. Blend until smooth.
6. Fold in the stiffly beaten whipping cream.
7. Spread over the cranberry mixture in the cups.
8. Freeze until firm.
9. When ready to serve, split the cups open.
10. Place the salad on a lettuce leaf with the cream cheese layer on the bottom.
11. If frozen in a tray, cut into pie-shaped wedges.
12. Serve on lettuce. The white layer will be on top.
Note: No attribution lines or metadata were included in the original recipe and have been removed from this version.
